rule CDB_MessagePackCSharp_LZ4_decompression_allo {
    meta:
        author = "CyberDudeBivash GOC - Sentinel APEX v39.0"
        description = "Detection for MessagePack-CSharp: LZ4 decompression allocates from unbounded declared output l"
        severity = "high"
        date = "2026-06-25"
    strings:
                $actor = "UNC-CDB-INGEST" ascii wide nocase
        $kw0 = "MessagePack" ascii wide nocase

}

executive_briefing.executive_summary: During the reporting period, the CYBERDUDEBIVASH Sentinel APEX platform processed 177 threat advisories. Of these, 14 are classified as CRITICAL risk and 42 as HIGH risk. 0 advisories involve vulnerabilities confirmed as actively exploited (CISA KEV). Primary threat actors include UNC-CDB-INGEST. The overall threat posture requires IMMEDIATE executive attention with focus on patch management and detection rule deployment.
